title: Offhand Mining
description: Lets you use the offhand to break blocks with the pickaxe (and later sword attacking)
body:
# Offhand Mining

This Mod lets you use the Offhand to mine Blocks with a Pickaxe and attack Enemies with your Sword.

## Alpha State
The Mod is for now, only in Alpha Version, because it has a lot of bugs. I hopefully will fix them, but I wanted to share it anyway, so if you want to test it, enjoy it.

## Known Bugs
1. Iron, Diamond, Netherite Pickaxe will instantly mine Blocks
2. Wood Sword is a bit weaker in Offhand (for example, a Pig needs 5, not 3 Hits)
3. Mining/Attacking Animation for Off and Mainhand
4. Missing Animations for Pickaxe and Sword

## Offhand
### Hey Guys, I was a bit Offhand Mining
![Offhand or was it Offcam?](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/7dd3d7061577370ea8cc917f1c2ce6a2d3c059db.png)

## Help
When you know how to fix this or have any Idea for this Mod or just want to help me improve the User Experience, then feel free to help me via Github for example.

https://github.com/BaGaJa004/Offhand_Mod/issues
